extraction.one_line_summary: ALMEIDA João attacked with 6km remaining on Monte Bondone, THOMAS Geraint bridged at 4.5km, both distanced ROGLIČ Primož by 25 seconds with THOMAS taking pink.
tactical_patterns: VINE Jay's pacing on final climb set up ALMEIDA João's 6km attack, forcing rivals to chase without teammates.
THOMAS Geraint bridged to ALMEIDA at 4.5km rather than attacking solo, conserving energy while isolating ROGLIČ.
HAIG Jack and KONRAD Patrick positioned in early break as GC insurance at 4:30 deficit, tactical safety net.

rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: attacked with enough distance (6km) on HC climb to hold off chasers, first GT stage win demonstrates final-climb finishing power
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: bridged uphill acceleration at 4.5km and took 25 seconds on ROGLIČ despite losing SIVAKOV Pavel support earlier
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: negative: required KUSS Sepp to limit losses to 25 seconds on HC finish, half-minute deficit at one point reveals vulnerability
rider_signals.DUNBAR Eddie: positive: survived from early break to finish fifth on stage, moved to GC fifth at 3:03 showing break-to-GC conversion ability
rider_signals.HEALY Ben: positive: maximized KOM points from early break on multiple climbs, took jersey with 20-point lead
rider_signals.CARTHY Hugh: negative: explicitly mentioned struggling with pace on final climb, losing ground on GC
rider_signals.VINE Jay: positive: paced final climb for UAE after FORMOLO, delivered ALMEIDA to launch point for winning attack
